creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
> Wrong.  gtkglarea, fsv, and xtraceroute depend on gtkgl.

Have you ever looked at LIB_DEPENDS line of these ports? 

Well, I surely confirmed that these three ports can be completed 
building/running without installing gtkGL.


-- 
KATO Tsuguru / tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
                     
Sent by Japanese ProntoMail
